subject: Kakuna — a pupa/cocoon-stage Pokemon with angular golden-amber chitinous shell and dark eye markings, depicted in dramatic close-up with radiating energy
description: Kakuna fills the frame in a dramatic close-up — its body is a segmented, angular shell of golden-amber and yellow tones, resembling overlapping armor plates or chitin. Dark oval markings serve as eyes on the upper portion of the form. Red energy lines radiate outward from the figure in all directions against a dark background, with scattered particles or debris suggesting an explosive or intense inner force. The composition is almost entirely filled by the creature itself, giving it a monolithic, imposing presence despite being a stationary pupa form. The palette is gold, amber, yellow, and deep red against a near-black background.
background: dark near-black with radiating red energy lines and particles
emotion: dormant but intensely charged; stillness masking internal transformation
